movie.actors: Charles Bronson, Lesley-Anne Down, Michael Parks, Chuck Shamata
movie.plot: Paul Kersey is back at working vigilante justice when his fiancée, Olivia, has her business threatened by mobsters.
movie.title: Death Wish V: The Face of Death
movie.writer: Brian Garfield (characters), Michael Colleary (story), Allan A. Goldstein (story), Allan A. Goldstein (screenplay)
